title: Portals
description: Custom portals for traveling around the world and dimensions!
body:
# Portals

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ly-portals?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ly-portals)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NmK7Y-IuHUA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 📖 Description

Crafting the Portal Orb now you can do a custom portal for traveling, you need to build a portal of 4x3 (like the Nether portal but smaller) and do right click with the Portal Orb above of the bottom block, the blocks of the portal can be any solid block, and when you join in a portal you're gonna teleported to the nearest portal with the same design.

## 🛠️ Recipe

![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/5pDllgy.png)

## ⌨️ Commands

Give Portal Orb:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot portals:portal_orb
```

Destroy all portals:

```mcfunction
/function portals:dev/reset
```
